violations.description: Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food with bare hands. -Observed employee cutting up tomatoes for the salad cold hold not wearing gloves.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Tongs in the salad cold hold are laying down in the lettuce.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooked potentially hazardous food was not cooled properly from 140F to 70F or below within two hours. -Large container of turkey in the walk in cooler tightly wrapped in tinfoil was still at 90 F at the end of the inspection. Owner separated it out to cool properly.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors of the walk in coolers and freezer need cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling areas in the back rooms in need of repair.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
